input.command:
gh release create v0.2.0 --title "v0.2.0" --notes "$(cat <<'EOF'
## What's Changed

**Major refactor: modular package structure**

Split monolithic command files and internal packages into focused, cohesive subpackages for better maintainability and developer experience.

### Commands reorganized
- `cmd/cloud/` — pull, push (cloud sync)
- `cmd/conn/` — connect, disconnect, connectors
- `cmd/ctx/` — context, knowledge
- `cmd/data/` — metrics, resolve, scrape, tier
- `cmd/email/` — list, log, replies, send, sync
- `cmd/enrich/` — enrich, save
- `cmd/hook/` — hook handlers (banner, session, sync, update)
- `cmd/seq/` — sequence, campaigns, analytics, leads, mailboxes, sends, tasks, suppress, engagement, dispatcher
- `cmd/skill/` — skills, learn, memory, install

### Internal packages decomposed
- `internal/resolve/` — split into resolve_email, resolve_linkedin, resolve_csv, helpers, types
- `internal/sequence/` — split into analytics, enrollment, helpers, mailbox, suppression, task, types
- `internal/sync/` — renamed session_summary → execution_delta, strategic_memory → execution_memory, added sync_db
- `internal/tier/` — split into db, scoring, types
- `internal/enrich/` — split into save, types
- `internal/db/` — split into migrations, schema
- `internal/assembly/` — split into helpers, types
- `internal/connector/` — split into generic_auth, generic_verify
- `internal/account/` — extracted convex_api
- `internal/update/` — extracted github
- `internal/session/` — extracted stale_skills

97 files changed, 8017 insertions, 7859 deletions. All tests passing.
EOF
)"

input.command:
gh release create v0.1.5 --title "v0.1.5" --notes "$(cat <<'EOF'
## What's Changed

**Refactor: modular package structure**

Split monolithic command files and internal packages into focused, cohesive subpackages.

### Commands reorganized
- `cmd/cloud/` -- pull, push
- `cmd/conn/` -- connect, disconnect, connectors
- `cmd/ctx/` -- context, knowledge
- `cmd/data/` -- metrics, resolve, scrape, tier
- `cmd/email/` -- list, log, replies, send, sync
- `cmd/enrich/` -- enrich, save
- `cmd/hook/` -- hook handlers (banner, session, sync, update)
- `cmd/seq/` -- sequence, campaigns, analytics, leads, mailboxes, sends, tasks, suppress, engagement, dispatcher
- `cmd/skill/` -- skills, learn, memory, install

### Internal packages decomposed
- `internal/resolve/` -- split into resolve_email, resolve_linkedin, resolve_csv, helpers, types
- `internal/sequence/` -- split into analytics, enrollment, helpers, mailbox, suppression, task, types
- `internal/sync/` -- renamed session_summary -> execution_delta, strategic_memory -> execution_memory, added sync_db
- `internal/tier/` -- split into db, scoring, types
- `internal/enrich/` -- split into save, types
- `internal/db/` -- split into migrations, schema
- `internal/assembly/` -- split into helpers, types
- `internal/connector/` -- split into generic_auth, generic_verify
- `internal/account/` -- extracted convex_api
- `internal/update/` -- extracted github
- `internal/session/` -- extracted stale_skills

97 files changed. All tests passing.
EOF
)"

## What's Changed

**Refactor: modular package structure**

Split monolithic command files and internal packages into focused, cohesive subpackages.

### Commands reorganized
- `cmd/cloud/` -- pull, push
- `cmd/conn/` -- connect, disconnect, connectors
- `cmd/ctx/` -- context, knowledge
- `cmd/data/` -- metrics, resolve, scrape, tier
- `cmd/email/` -- list, log, replies, send, sync
- `cmd/enrich/` -- enrich, save
- `cmd/hook/` -- hook handlers (banner, session, sync, update)
- `cmd/seq/` -- sequence, campaigns, analytics, leads, mailboxes, sends, tasks, suppress, engagement, dispatcher
- `cmd/skill/` -- skills, learn, memory, install

### Internal packages decomposed
- `internal/resolve/` -- split into resolve_email, resolve_linkedin, resolve_csv, helpers, types
- `internal/sequence/` -- split into analytics, enrollment, helpers, mailbox, suppression, task, types
- `internal/sync/` -- renamed session_summary -> execution_delta, strategic_memory -> execution_memory, added sync_db
- `internal/tier/` -- split into db, scoring, types
- `internal/enrich/` -- split into save, types
- `internal/db/` -- split into migrations, schema
- `internal/assembly/` -- split into helpers, types
- `internal/connector/` -- split into generic_auth, generic_verify
- `internal/account/` -- extracted convex_api
- `internal/update/` -- extracted github
- `internal/session/` -- extracted stale_skills

97 files changed. All tests passing.

gh release create v0.1.5 --title "v0.1.5" --notes "$(cat <<'EOF'
## What's Changed

**Refactor: modular package structure**

Split monolithic command files and internal packages into focused, cohesive subpackages.

### Commands reorganized
- `cmd/cloud/` -- pull, push
- `cmd/conn/` -- connect, disconnect, connectors
- `cmd/ctx/` -- context, knowledge
- `cmd/data/` -- metrics, resolve, scrape, tier
- `cmd/email/` -- list, log, replies, send, sync
- `cmd/enrich/` -- enrich, save
- `cmd/hook/` -- hook handlers (banner, session, sync, update)
- `cmd/seq/` -- sequence, campaigns, analytics, leads, mailboxes, sends, tasks, suppress, engagement, dispatcher
- `cmd/skill/` -- skills, learn, memory, install

### Bug fixes
- Fix Windows cross-compilation (platform-specific file locking)

97 files changed. All tests passing.
EOF
)"
